info.description: API server to manage Backpack Inventory and Packing Lists
info.title: PimpMyPack API

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token

get.description: Confirm email address by providing username and email

post.description: Send a new password to the user's email

Log in a user by providing username (or email) and password
The username field accepts either a username or an email address
Returns access token (short-lived) and refresh token (long-lived)
Use remember_me to extend refresh token lifetime

200.description: Login successful with access and refresh tokens

401.description: Invalid credentials or account not confirmed

post.description: Register a new user with username, password, email, firstname, and lastname
Resend confirmation email to a pending user account. Always returns 200 to prevent user enumeration.

get.description: Retrieves pack metadata and contents using a sharing code

200.description: Shared pack with metadata and contents

404.description: Pack not found or not shared

get.description:
Returns public profile information and shared packs for a user.
Returns 404 for non-existent users or users without a public profile (anti-enumeration).
Get the banner/hero image for a user account
Get the profile image for a user account

post.description: Import from lighterpack csv pack file
post.summary: Import from lighterpack csv pack file

200.description: CSV data imported successfully with pack ID

post.description: Import items from a LighterPack sharing URL into a new pack
post.summary: Import a pack from a LighterPack sharing URL

post.description: Import items from a PimpMyPack sharing URL into a new pack
post.summary: Import a pack from a PimpMyPack sharing URL

get.description: Get information of the currently logged-in user

put.description: Update information of the currently logged-in user (email, name, preferences only)

parameters.description: Account update data (excludes role, status, username)
parameters.name: input

post.description: Upload or update the banner/hero image for the currently logged-in user

parameters.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)
parameters.name: image

delete.description: Delete the banner/hero image for the currently logged-in user

post.description: Upload or update the profile image for the currently logged-in user

parameters.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)
parameters.name: image

delete.description: Delete the profile image for the currently logged-in user

get.description: Retrieves a list of all inventories of the user
get.summary: Get all inventories of the user

403.description: This item does not belong to you
This item does not belong to you
This item does not belong to you

get.description: Get the image for an inventory item. Only the item owner can view the image.

403.description: Forbidden

404.description: Item not found or has no image

post.description: Upload or update an image for an inventory item. Only the item owner can upload images.
post.summary: Upload or update inventory item image

parameters.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)
parameters.name: image

403.description: Item does not belong to user

delete.description: Delete the image for an inventory item. Only the item owner can delete images.

403.description: Item does not belong to user

This pack does not belong to you

post.description: Mark a pack as favorite. Only one pack per user can be favorite at a time (idempotent)

403.description: This pack does not belong to you

delete.description: Remove favorite status from a pack (idempotent)

403.description: This pack does not belong to you

post.description: Upload or update an image for a pack. Only the pack owner can upload images.

parameters.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)
parameters.name: image

403.description: Pack does not belong to user

delete.description: Delete the image for a pack. Only the pack owner can delete images.

403.description: Pack does not belong to user

put.description: Update My pack content ID by Pack ID
put.summary: Update My pack content ID by Pack ID

403.description: This pack does not belong to you

delete.description: Delete a pack content by ID
delete.summary: Delete a pack content by ID

403.description: This pack does not belong to you
This pack does not belong to you

post.description: Generate a sharing code for a pack to make it publicly accessible (idempotent)

403.description: This pack does not belong to you

delete.description: Remove the sharing code from a pack to make it private (idempotent)

403.description: This pack does not belong to you

get.description: Returns the allowed values for season, trail, and adventure fields

get.description: Get the image for a pack. Public packs are accessible without authentication.
